name: UI Layer
description: Next.js App Router pages, root and authenticated layouts, and global styles that form the presentation and routing shell of the application (excluding API route handlers).

name: Component Layer
description: Reusable React UI components including navigation, providers, badges, filters, status controls, and Recharts-based dashboard visualizations.

name: API Layer
description: Next.js App Router API route handlers exposing REST endpoints for authentication, dashboard analytics, feedback CRUD, ingest triggering, and Slack webhooks.

name: Service Layer
description: Core business logic and domain services in src/lib: the ingest pipeline orchestrator, LLM analysis, GitHub ingestion adapter, Slack notifications, NextAuth configuration, the Prisma client singleton, and request-protection middleware.

name: Shared Utility & Types Layer
description: Foundational shared helpers and type definitions with high fan-in used across UI, API, and service layers: className/date/format/backoff utilities, sentiment/topic/status constants, and NextAuth type augmentations.

name: Data Layer
description: Database schema and persistence definitions: the Prisma schema, initial PostgreSQL migration SQL, individual table definitions, and the migration lock file.

name: Infrastructure & Operations Layer
description: Deployment and operational tooling: AWS SAM/CloudFormation template, the Lambda ingest handler, Docker Compose for local Postgres, the Amplify build spec, and build/seed/ingest CLI scripts.

name: Configuration Layer
description: Project-level configuration and build settings: package manifest, TypeScript compiler config, environment variable template, Next.js/PostCSS/Tailwind configs, the incremental build cache, and analysis ignore patterns.

name: Documentation Layer
description: Project documentation including the root README covering architecture and deployment, and the AWS deployment guide.
